title: Phase 6B: Receiving module - service, API, receiving workflow, discrepancy review
description: Build receiving module: receiving service with PO receive, line-by-line processing, discrepancy handling, and vendor issue creation; API routes; expected receipts calendar page; PO receiving workflow page; and discrepancy review queue.
steps: Create src/lib/services/receiving.service.ts with PO receiving (line-by-line: receive, short, over, damaged, substitute, reject)
Implement discrepancy detection and vendor issue creation
Create src/app/api/receiving/route.ts with GET (list) and POST (create receiving record)
Create src/app/api/receiving/[id]/route.ts with GET, PUT (status update)
Create src/app/api/receiving/[id]/lines/route.ts with receiving line management
Create src/app/(dashboard)/receiving/page.tsx with expected receipts calendar view
Create src/app/(dashboard)/receiving/[id]/page.tsx with PO receiving workflow (mobile-first, line-by-line)
